history.content:
<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead and two cells to the right from my current position. However, the path directly forward and to the right is blocked by dangerous lava cells L. My only clear option is to turn right to find a safer route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible on my left side beyond a wall, and there is a clear path between me and the goal except for walls blocking direct access. The cell straight ahead is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. I should turn left to face the open cells to my left, which may lead me around the walls toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Looking ahead, the cells in front of me have lava (L), which is dangerous to move into. The goal G is visible two cells to the right and two cells ahead from my current position. The row I'm facing has walls (#) to the left but the cell directly to the right of me appears free (.). To safely proceed towards the goal, I will turn right first to face the free cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent stands near two lava cells to the left and right, and a wall directly in front. The goal G is visible two cells ahead and two cells to the left. I cannot move forward because of the wall, so I need to turn. Turning left will face me towards the goal location and floor cells that might give a path forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I see the goal G two cells ahead and two cells to the right. However, directly in front of me and the cell to the right are lava cells, so moving forward or right is unsafe. I should turn left to explore a potentially safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I see a wall in front and to the left, but there is lava directly ahead. Moving forward could be deadly. The only safe immediate choice is to turn left or right. Since the left is also blocked by a wall, I will turn right to avoid the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead and two cells to the right. The cell directly in front is floor and safe to move into. However, the cells to the right and forward-right contain lava, so I should avoid them. I will move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
